commentaryagent.name: commentaryagent
commentaryagent.description:
Commentary Agent that provides LLM-based explanations and insights.

This agent wraps the Commentary Engine and provides a standardized interface
for generating commentary across the trading system.

capabilities.name: execute
capabilities.description:
Execute the agent's main logic.

Args:
    **kwargs: Agent-specific parameters
    
Returns:
    AgentResult: Result of the execution

capabilities.name: analyze_performance
capabilities.description:
Analyze trading performance.

Args:
    symbol: Trading symbol
    performance_data: Performance metrics
    
Returns:
    AgentResult with performance analysis

capabilities.name: assess_risk
capabilities.description:
Assess trading risks.

Args:
    symbol: Trading symbol
    trade_data: Trade details (optional)
    portfolio_data: Portfolio data (optional)
    
Returns:
    AgentResult with risk assessment

capabilities.name: disable
capabilities.description: Disable the agent.

capabilities.name: enable
capabilities.description: Enable the agent.

capabilities.name: explain_trade
capabilities.description:
Explain a trading decision.

Args:
    symbol: Trading symbol
    trade_data: Trade details
    market_data: Market data
    
Returns:
    AgentResult with trade explanation

capabilities.name: generate_commentary
capabilities.description:
Generate commentary based on the request.

Args:
    request: Commentary request
    
Returns:
    AgentResult with commentary data

capabilities.name: get_commentary_statistics
capabilities.description: Get commentary generation statistics.

capabilities.name: get_config
capabilities.description: Get the agent configuration.

capabilities.name: get_execution_history
capabilities.description:
Get execution history.

Args:
    limit: Maximum number of results to return
    
Returns:
    List of execution results

capabilities.name: get_metadata
capabilities.description:
Get agent metadata for registration.

Returns:
    Dict containing agent metadata

capabilities.name: get_performance_stats
capabilities.description:
Get performance statistics.

Returns:
    Dictionary with performance statistics

capabilities.name: get_status
capabilities.description: Get the current status of the agent.

capabilities.name: handle_error
capabilities.description:
Handle errors during execution.

Args:
    error: Exception that occurred
    
Returns:
    AgentResult: Error result

capabilities.name: is_enabled
capabilities.description: Check if the agent is enabled.

capabilities.name: is_running
capabilities.description: Check if the agent is currently running.

capabilities.name: load_state
capabilities.description:
Load agent state from file.

Args:
    filepath: Path to load state from
    
Returns:
    bool: True if load was successful

capabilities.name: reset
capabilities.description: Reset agent state and statistics.

capabilities.name: run
capabilities.description:
Run the agent with error handling and status updates.

Args:
    **kwargs: Agent-specific parameters
    
Returns:
    AgentResult: Result of the execution

capabilities.name: save_state
capabilities.description:
Save agent state to file.

Args:
    filepath: Path to save state
    
Returns:
    bool: True if save was successful

capabilities.name: update_config
capabilities.description:
Update agent configuration.

Args:
    new_config: New configuration values
    
Returns:
    bool: True if update was successful

capabilities.name: validate_config
capabilities.description:
Validate agent configuration.

Returns:
    bool: True if configuration is valid

capabilities.name: validate_input
capabilities.description:
Validate input parameters.

Args:
    **kwargs: Parameters to validate
    
Returns:
    bool: True if input is valid

dependencies:
Commentary Agent that provides LLM-based explanations and insights.

This agent wraps the Commentary Engine and provides a standardized interface
for generating commentary across the trading system.
commentaryagent.author: Unknown

dataqualityagent.name: dataqualityagent
dataqualityagent.description:
Agent responsible for:
- Detecting data quality issues and anomalies
- Monitoring data consistency and timeliness
- Automatically routing to backup data providers
- Providing data quality reports and recommendations

capabilities.name: execute
capabilities.description:
Execute the data quality assessment logic.
Args:
    **kwargs: data, symbol, data_source, action, etc.
Returns:
    AgentResult

capabilities.name: assess_data_quality
capabilities.description:
Assess the quality of market data.

Args:
    data: Market data DataFrame
    symbol: Asset symbol
    data_source: Source of the data
    
Returns:
    DataQualityReport with quality assessment
